chunks.title: About
chunks.text: I build applied AI systems that automate decisions. I care about reliability, guardrails, and practical delivery (not demos that break in production).

chunks.title: Work style: guardrails
chunks.text: I don’t ship AI without guardrails: validation, deterministic fallbacks, monitoring, and clear failure modes. If something is unknown, I say so and route it correctly.

chunks.title: Core skills
chunks.text: Core focus: automation-first systems, clean interfaces, and practical AI integration. (Edit this block to list your exact tools: Python, JS, n8n, Jira/Confluence, etc.)

chunks.title: This portfolio
chunks.text: This site is an interactive portfolio corridor. Scroll to explore projects and click doors to open details.
